jobs.name: Bumpy Rind Bullying
jobs.imagePrompt: Pixar-like anthropomorphic fruit revenge drama opening frame, premium cinematic 3D render, vertical 9:16. In a bright high-school cafeteria with glossy tile floors, skylight panels, fluorescent strips, chrome lunch tables, colorful juice posters, and crowded lunch trays, Lola Lemon stands on a bench leaning toward Ozzie Orange and mocking the bumpy pores on his rind while her polished clique laughs around her. Ozzie stands frozen with a dented lunch tray and flushed embarrassed eyes. Scarlet Cherry sits a few tables away by the windows, gorgeous and silent, noticing everything over the rim of a red notebook. Keep the exact same fruit identities, wardrobe, school environment, and polished stylized 3D finish. No text, no watermark.
jobs.continuityAnchors: Ozzie Orange must stay a bumpy bright-orange underdog in a faded navy varsity jacket, cafeteria polo, dark jeans, white sneakers, and green lunch-card lanyard. Lola Lemon must stay a glamorous glossy lemon in a cropped white cheer jacket, metallic gold skirt, white boots, bracelets, and phone chain. Scarlet Cherry should remain stunning, poised, and silent in her black off-shoulder top and crimson satin skirt near the cafeteria windows. Preserve the same bright school cafeteria with skylights, fluorescent panels, chrome tables, polished tile floors, and stylized premium 3D finish.

jobs.name: Banana Alley Deal
jobs.imagePrompt: Pixar-like anthropomorphic fruit revenge drama deal frame, premium cinematic 3D render, vertical 9:16. In a grimy alley behind the school cafeteria with dumpsters, wet concrete, buzzing service lights, chain-link fence shadows, and steam from a kitchen vent, Ozzie Orange nervously hands crumpled cash to Silas Banana while Silas smirks and presents a glowing neon-green serum vial between fingerless gloved hands. Ozzie's lunch card lanyard and varsity jacket tie him clearly to the school world. Silas looks delighted by the chaos he is selling. Keep Ozzie and Silas exact to their locked designs with the same polished stylized 3D finish and no text or watermark.
jobs.continuityAnchors: Ozzie Orange must stay visually identical to clip 1, still awkward and stung but now desperate enough to act. Silas Banana must stay a lanky bruised banana hustler in a black faux-leather jacket, dark hoodie, fingerless gloves, cargo pants, and beat-up sneakers with clipped serum vials. Preserve the same stylized school world by moving into the grimy service alley behind the cafeteria with dumpsters, wet concrete, service light glow, and steam from the kitchen vent.

jobs.name: Serum Tray Switch
jobs.imagePrompt: Pixar-like anthropomorphic fruit revenge drama setup frame, premium cinematic 3D render, vertical 9:16. Back inside the cafeteria service line under bright fluorescent panels and stainless-steel sneeze guards, stage a literal two-tray swap in the foreground as the hero action. Ozzie Orange's hands must be the focal point: his left hand yanks the clean untouched tray backward while his right hand shoves the serum-loaded luxury tray forward into Lola Lemon's spot at the exact same instant. Keep both trays fully visible side by side so the switch reads in one glance. The treated tray must show obvious neon-green droplets and a faint toxic glow on the noodles and dessert cup, while the clean tray being removed is clearly plain and dry. Lola's glossy yellow hand with bracelets reaches for the swapped tray without noticing. Silas Banana watches from a shadowy service doorway with a pleased grin, and Scarlet Cherry notices from deeper in the lunchroom without interfering. Keep the same fruit identities, wardrobe, cafeteria props, and polished 3D continuity. No text, no watermark.
jobs.continuityAnchors: Ozzie Orange, Lola Lemon, Silas Banana, and Scarlet Cherry must remain exact to their locked hero designs. Preserve the same school cafeteria with fluorescent panels, steel sneeze guards, lunch trays, juice boxes, gelatin cups, and polished tile. Ozzie should look frightened but newly focused. Silas stays in shadow, Cherry notices from afar, and Lola remains vain and unaware. Keep the polished 3D finish and school-world proportions intact.

jobs.name: Hideous Lunch Mutation
jobs.imagePrompt: Pixar-like anthropomorphic fruit revenge drama shock payoff frame, premium cinematic 3D render, vertical 9:16. In the middle of the school cafeteria, catch the mutation at its ugliest mid-eruption moment, not before or after. Lola Lemon's glamorous face must be violently ruined: rind split open into asymmetrical blistered folds, one eye bulging wide while the other melts nearly shut, jaw twisted off-center, lashes glued together with neon slime, cheek blown outward, and torn peel seams leaking stringy pulp, fluorescent green foam, and cafeteria sludge down her white jacket and gold skirt. Her clique must look truly hideous too, transformed into swollen rotten fruit wrecks with warped mouths, ruptured peel patches, dripping mush, and collapsing glam. Trays flip overhead, green slime whips through the air, and students recoil in horror. Ozzie Orange stands nearby in stunned dark satisfaction, while Scarlet Cherry rises behind him with fresh interest. Keep it grotesque, shocking, and absurd while preserving the same polished stylized 3D school world, exact cast identities, wardrobe, and no text or watermark.
jobs.continuityAnchors: Ozzie Orange must remain the same awkward orange, now lit by the chaos he caused. Lola Lemon must begin as the same glamorous lemon bully, then mutate into a truly hideous asymmetrical cafeteria abomination without becoming a different species. Scarlet Cherry must remain gorgeous and calm, rising in the background as her interest in Ozzie changes. Preserve the same cafeteria environment, fluorescent brightness, chrome tables, trays, slime, and polished 3D finish while pushing the mutation into aggressive body-horror fruit grotesquerie.

jobs.name: Cherry Chooses Orange
jobs.imagePrompt: Pixar-like anthropomorphic fruit revenge drama status-flip ending frame, premium cinematic 3D render, vertical 9:16. In the cafeteria aftermath with trays overturned, green serum slime, stunned students, and the hideous mutated bullies collapsed in the blurry background, Scarlet Cherry strides straight past the ruined table and takes Ozzie Orange by the hand. Ozzie stands shocked and glowing with new confidence despite the same bumpy rind. Scarlet is gorgeous, poised, and completely uninterested in the former bullies. Silas Banana leans in a distant doorway smirking like he expected chaos. Bright cafeteria light, glossy tile reflections, red notebook on the table, and polished 3D finish keep the same world intact. Preserve exact fruit identities, wardrobe, proportions, and no text or watermark.
